ast.name: error
ast.source: forceFrameRate takes a positive int between 0 and 125, forcing frame rates higher than 125 fps is not supported
ast.target: forceFrameRate 接受一个介于 0 到 125 之间的正整数，不支持强制帧率高于 125 fps

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the property to determine the created date of the note.
ast.target: 使用属性确定笔记的创建日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The property to use to determine the created date of the note. This is only applicable if the "Use property for created date" setting is enabled.
ast.target: 用于确定笔记创建日期的属性。仅当启用了“使用属性作为创建日期”设置时适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format to use when parsing the created date from the property.
ast.target: 从属性解析创建日期时使用的格式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When selecting a specific date in the calender, display all the notes created on that date below the calendar.
ast.target: 在日历中选择特定日期时，在该日期下方显示当天创建的所有笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Display an indicator below the date or week number if the date has a note.
ast.target: 如果日期有笔记，在日期或周数下方显示指示器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show a numeric badge on each calendar day counting the notes created on that date. Requires "Display notes created on selected date" to also be enabled.
ast.target: 在每个日历日期上显示数字徽章，统计该日期创建的笔记数量。需要同时启用“显示选定日期创建的笔记”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use a modifier key to create a note instead of clicking on the date.
ast.target: 使用修饰键创建笔记，而不是单击日期。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Use property for the created date of a note
ast.target: 使用属性作为笔记的创建日期

ast.name: name
ast.source: Display a count of notes created on each date
ast.target: 显示每个日期创建的笔记数量
